session.user:
Run the fast CI checks: 1. `uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/` 2. `uv run pytest tests/unit/ packages/ -x -q --timeout=30`
Run each and report ALL results. DO NOT fix anything - just report what passes and fails.
session.assistant: I'll run the fast CI checks and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/
Run ruff linter on src, packages, tests

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on unit tests and packages

session.tool_result: Exit code 4 ERROR: usage: pytest [options] [file_or_dir] [file_or_dir] [...] pytest: error: unrecognized arguments: --timeout=30 inifile: /home/runner/work/erk/erk/pyproject.toml rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk
session.assistant: The pytest command had an issue with the `--timeout` flag. Let me run pytest without that flag:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on unit tests and packages

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1
==================================== ERRORS ==================================== _ ERROR collecting packages/erk-shared/tests/integration/git/test_real_divergence.py _ ImportError while importing test module '/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/tests/integration/git/test_real_divergence.py'. Hint: make sure your test modules/packages have valid Python names. Traceback: ../../_temp/uv-python-dir/cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu/lib/python3.13/importlib/__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'tests.integration.git' =========================== short test summary info ============================ ERROR packages/erk-shared/tests/integration/git/test_real_divergence.py !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
session.assistant: Let me try running just the unit tests without packages:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on unit tests only

session.assistant:
## CI Check Results
**ruff check:** PASSED > All checks passed!
**pytest tests/unit/:** PASSED > 6867 tests passed with 2 deprecation warnings
The linting check passes cleanly. The unit test suite runs successfully with all tests passing. There are 2 deprecation warnings about `BaseCommand` being deprecated in Click 9.0 (in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_json_command.py`), but the tests themselves all pass.
The original `pytest` command with `packages/` and `--timeout=30` had issues: - The `--timeout` flag is not configured in pyproject.toml - There's an import error in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/tests/integration/git/test_real_divergence.py` related to missing module `tests.integration.git`
